---
title: "About"
image: bio-photo.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: house
      text: Homepage
      href: https://stefanbschneider.github.io/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/stefanbschneider/

---

Hi, I am Vikreth (100% you just pronounced my name wrong). 
I am currently a 5th year student at Institute of Technology of Cambodia, majoring in **Data Science**. 
I use this blog to store my assignment, TP, and/or my project of my school. 

Contact details and more information about myself are on my [website](https://stefanbschneider.github.io/).

I created this blog using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).
